name: Calculator
description: Everyday, scientific, and unit/currency calculator with history
author: Moldable

capabilities.name: Calculator compute
capabilities.description: Allow approved apps to evaluate math expressions and convert units or currency using Calculator.

scopes.name: Evaluate an expression
scopes.description: Evaluate an arithmetic or scientific math expression and return the numeric result. Records the calculation to history.

angleMode.description: Angle unit for trigonometric functions. Defaults to deg.

record.description: Whether to save this calculation to history. Defaults to true.

scopes.name: Convert units or currency
scopes.description: Convert a value between units in a category (length, mass, temperature, volume, area, speed, data, time) or between currencies.

category.description: Optional conversion category. Inferred from the units when omitted.

record.description: Whether to save this conversion to history. Defaults to true.

capabilities.name: Calculator history
capabilities.description: Allow approved apps to read and search past calculations in this workspace.

scopes.name: Recent calculations
scopes.description: Read the most recent calculations and conversions for this workspace.

scopes.name: Search calculations
scopes.description: Search past calculations and conversions by expression or result.

scopes.name: Clear calculation history
scopes.description: Delete all saved calculations and conversions for this workspace.

tagline: Everyday, scientific, and unit/currency math — with history
